title: New Team Leader/Purchasing Specialist
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN VINSMART FUTURE
job_description:
Job description
ABOUT LOCATION
VinSmart Future is looking for candidates for the position of Team Leader/Purchasing Specialist to accompany large-scale technology, infrastructure and digital transformation projects. The position is responsible for developing and implementing procurement plans, finding and managing suppliers, organizing bidding, negotiating contracts and optimizing investment efficiency.
The candidate will be in charge of one of the specialized fields including: Technology Infrastructure, Specialized Equipment & Licenses, IT Services & Consulting or IT Centralized Procurement. This is an opportunity to work with leading domestic and international technology partners, and participate in strategic projects in the Vingroup ecosystem.
PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES
• Implement the purchasing process:
 • Receive procurement requests from departments; Check, confirm and handle the approval process properly
 • Carry out sourcing, price solicitation, negotiation, unit price approval and supplier selection
 • Build and operate IT procurement center processes
 • Coordinate with Finance, Legal, and Accounting to complete contract signing procedures
 • Manage and store documents, approved by BP: ensure completeness, accuracy and security of documents
• Monitor progress and report on purchases:
 • Monitor the progress of processing documents and contracts; Periodically report status and arising problems
 • Report on cost optimization, process compliance, supplier and individual evaluation
 • Prepare documents for periodic and unscheduled internal inspections and audits
 • Ensure compliance with internal procurement processes and relevant legal regulations
• Improve processes and team capacity:
 • Assign work, train and monitor the performance of team members (Team Leader)
 • Evaluate and propose capacity development for the purchasing team (Team Leader)
 • Propose improvements to the procurement process; Apply e-procurement system to automate and increase transparency
 • Analyze IT supplier market trends; Propose strategies to optimize supply chain costs and risks
Job requirements

REQUEST
• Graduated from University or higher majoring in: Economics, Foreign Affairs, Commerce, Law, Finance,....
• Experience - For Professionals:
 • From 2 years of experience in the field of: Purchasing, Procurement, Vendor Management, Administration, Contract Management, Bidding
• Experience - For Team Leader:
 • From 5 years of relevant experience.
 • Experience managing teams or coordinating large-scale procurement packages.
 • Ability to build procurement strategies and manage suppliers.
• Professional knowledge
 • Understanding of procurement, bidding and contract management processes.
 • Have knowledge of the IT market and technology products and services.
 • Understanding of cost structures, deployment and operation models of technology solutions is an advantage.
• Good negotiation and bargaining skills.
• Cost analysis and supplier evaluation skills.
• Planning and progress management skills.
• Multi-departmental communication and coordination skills.
• Service mindset and results orientation.
• Ability to read and understand technical documents and contracts in English.

title: New Software Development Staff
job_description:
Job description
Do you want to be part of a second home, a place filled with smiles and peace of mind?


At Brother Vietnam Industrial Co., Ltd., we are not only a factory that produces products of outstanding quality, but also a family, where each member feels proud. We are always looking for talented and enthusiastic people to build a happy and successful working environment together.


We are looking for a talented Software Developer to join our team!


About us:


With the vision "Becoming a second home filled with smiles and peace of mind, the pride of employees and their families", and the mission "Maintaining a factory that produces products of outstanding quality, always chosen by customers", Brother Vietnam is committed to providing employees with a friendly, professional working environment and full of development opportunities.


* Job details 


Developing AI applications at the company:


• During the current period, will participate in an internal chatbot development project. (The project uses a modern AI platform model, combined with NLP and text document processing to provide the most suitable answers to user requests.) 
• Coordinate with departments to survey and analyze system requirements.
• Design and manufacture software to visualize and reduce operations according to departmental requirements.


Job requirements

- Graduated from University majoring in: Mathematics and Information Technology; Computer Science; Embedded programming; Artificial Intelligence; Data science and artificial intelligence, IOT and applied AI. 
- Good programming with python programming language. Priority is given to those who can design a website on the FastAPI, Vuejs framework, and are able to work with vector DB. 
- Have participated in projects or had major assignments on AI topics, natural language processing, chatbots, and web.

・ Attractive salary. Annual salary increase regime.
・ There is a shuttle bus from Hanoi, Hung Yen, Hai Duong to the company.

- Clearly state the contact phone number

title: Mới Senior Human Resources Consultant
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Overview
You will join the HR Operations team (4 members) to deliver end-to-end HR operational excellence across employee lifecycle, HR systems, compliance, global mobility and payroll coordination. Ensure smooth daily HR operations while continuously improving processes and employee experience.


1. Onboarding & Offboarding
• Manage end-to-end onboarding and offboarding processes, including account creation, system guidance, documentation collection, and coordination with relevant departments
• Organize onboarding programs by assigning projects, mentors, buddies, and delivering onboarding training sessions
• Provide new hires with essential company and role information (policies, work schedules, dress code, etc.) and address related queries
• Handle resignation and offboarding procedures, including preparing documentation, conducting reference checks, and ensuring proper handover


2. HR Policies and Procedures
• Develop, update, and ensure implementation of HR policies and procedures in compliance with Vietnam labor law
• Manage and maintain all HR documentation, including labor contracts, renewals, probation confirmations, and employee movement decisions (promotion, transfer, termination)
• Maintain accurate HR records and databases, ensuring all employee information and contract status are up to date
• Monitor and improve HR systems and processes in coordination with the global team to ensure efficiency and alignment


3. Employee Benefits
• Administer and communicate employee benefits programs, including private insurance, Employee Assistance Program (EAP), and annual health checkups
• Ensure smooth execution and employee awareness of all company benefit initiatives


4. Employee Supports
• Serve as the main point of contact for employee inquiries, providing guidance on HR policies, procedures, and the employee handbook
• Support employee administration, including profile updates, organizational chart maintenance, and coordination with internal departments
• Other Tasks Assigned by Head of HR


5. Reporting
• Take charge of required external & internal reports timely & accuracy
Yêu cầu công việc

• Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related fields
• Candidate with 5 - 7 years of working experience in a similar scope of work
• Long-term orientation in HR Operations
• Advanced proficiency in English and Microsoft Office
• Good communication, teamwork and interpersonal skills
• Must be approachable and helpful
• Open-minded, automation-oriented, data-driven mindset, proactive in enhancing manual processes
• Able to multitask and respect deadlines
• Thorough knowledge of labor laws and practices is a plus
• Have experience working with e-contract

title: Mới Account Manager (B2B / Enterprise)
company: Công Ty CP Giải Pháp Kinh Doanh Nền Tảng - Basebs
job_description:
Job description
Job description 
1. Business development (New Business)
● Proactively build pipeline, identify, reach and expand target customer base (BFSI, Retail, FMCG, Enterprise...).
● Develop and maintain relationships with new and existing customers and assigned accounts.
● Consulting on technology solutions (Contact Center, CRM, AI Chatbot/Voicebot...) suitable to customer needs.
2. Consulting & selling solutions (Solution Selling)
● Coordinate with Marketing and Consulting teams to build proposals and demo solutions.
● Lead the consulting, negotiation and contract closing process.
● Work closely with the operations team and company resources to ensure effective and consistent sales results.
3. Customer management & development (Account Growth)
● Maintain and develop relationships with current customers.
● Upsell / Cross-sell products and services.
● Collect feedback to improve products and enhance customer experience.
4. Pipeline management & reporting
● Monitor sales progress and forecast revenue.
● Coordinate with departments to prepare Proposal, Quotation, Contract, payment reconciliation and debt collection.
● Report pipeline, deal status and market insight.
● Ensure achievement of individual and team sales KPIs.
Job requirements

Candidate requirements
1. Experience & expertise
● Graduated from college or higher, majoring in Economics or Business Administration is preferred
● At least 2 years of experience in a similar position: Customer Relationship Management, Sales, Customer Management, Business Development, Customer Care, Consulting
● Have experience in the field of Contact Center, CRM Solutions or Specializing in High-tech product solutions.
● Experience in identifying and closing contracts with new customers.
● Priority is given to having network or experience in:
o BFSI (Banking, Finance, Insurance)
o Retail / FMCG / Chain stores 
2. Skills
● Priority is given to having the following skills: Customer Management, Planning, Presentation, Communication, Consulting, Bidding, Negotiation, Contracts,
● Proactive and have a business mindset.
● Able to work cross-team (Sales – Marketing – Consulting).


Remuneration regime
● Attractive income: Fixed salary (from 22 million) + KPI + attractive commission
● Working hours: Monday – Friday (08:00 – 17:00)
● Social insurance + Full health insurance
● Provide a working laptop
● Annual travel, monthly internal activities
● Opportunity to work with large customers and digital transformation projects

title: Product IT Specialist (Healthcare Software)
company: CÔNG TY TNHH SYSMEX VIỆT NAM
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Nộp hồ sơ ứng tuyển: Ứng viên ứng tuyển vui lòng nộp hồ sơ trên trang tuyển dụng Sysmex ở link sau: https://careers.sysmex-ap.com/job-invite/840/
=> Các hồ sơ không nộp trên trang tuyển dụng của Sysmex sẽ không được xử lý.


***Minimum 3 years of relevant IT working experience in the In Vitro Diagnostics (IVD) field. Candidates from other industries will not be considered.


Job Purpose:
•	To provide application and technical support on HCLAB software, hardware, and solution.
•	To ensure system stability, data integrity, and customer satisfaction, and to resolve customer issues and complaints related to HCLAB in a professional and timely manner.


Key Responsibilities:
A. Healthcare IT Implementation & Integration:
1.Develop HCLAB training materials and conduct LIS/WAM training for end-users, Product Specialists, and internal Application & Technical teams.
2.Provide professional IT application support on HCLAB software installation, configuration, testing, troubleshooting, and error diagnosis.
3.Provide support and expert assistance to internal and external customers for HCLAB-related software and hardware requests and troubleshooting.
4.Provide on-site, telephone, or remote support to clients for troubleshooting and repair of HCLAB.
5.Manage project activities from implementation to go-live, and track and ensure achievement of project milestones.
6.Ensure system stability, data integrity, and compliance with deployment procedures.
7.HCLAB/LIS/IT market business analysis to prospect market potentials for Sysmex IT business.
8.Explore sales leads and opportunities to promote and penetrate HCLAB solutions.
9.Develop HCLAB/LIS/IT business at potential accounts.


B. Technical Support & Troubleshooting
10.Provide on-site and remote technical support to hospitals and laboratories.
11.Analyze incidents, identify root causes, and implement corrective and preventive actions.
12.Monitor recurring issues and coordinate issue escalation with Regional IT teams when required.
13.Perform periodic preventive maintenance to ensure reliable system performance.


C. Training & Knowledge Transfer
14.Conduct end-user training for hospital IT staff and laboratory users.
15.Support technical and application training for internal staff and distributors.
16.Create, update, and maintain training materials, user guides, troubleshooting documents, and IT application documentation (training records, LIS projects, CRM, ISO) to support effective knowledge sharing.


D. Reporting & CRM Management
17.Manage reporting activities and CRM data; ensure SOP compliance in daily operations and support Managers/Supervisors in reviewing, developing, and improving procedures and guidelines.
18.Prepare technical reports and service documentation as required by the Service Manager.
E. Cross-functional & Customer Engagement
19.Collaborate closely with Application Specialists, Service Engineers, Sales, and Regional IT teams.
20.Collect customer feedback and market information to support service improvement and business development.
21.Support service-related customer events to enhance Sysmex brand and customer satisfaction.

Education:

Experience
•	Minimum 3 years of experience in IT implementation, healthcare software deployment, or hospital IT systems.
•	Hands-on experience with SQL Server and/or Oracle.


Skills & Knowledge:
•	Good understanding of IT systems and healthcare IT environments.
Attitude
•	Basic understanding of hospital IT environment and system integration.
•	Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple priorities.


Preferred Qualifications:
•	Experience with LIS/HIS system and HL7 integration.
•	Basic application knowledge in hematology, hemostasis, urinalysis, immunology, or biochemistry.

•	Customer Orientation

•	Business Acumen

title: New UA 3D Designer
company: Công Ty TNHH Nexon Creative Studio VINA
job_description:
Job description
Our team started from vividly showing through videos a unique form of advertising called playable, then developed these videos into game‑style playable ads that users can directly play. We are looking for someone who will be responsible for art quality for this entire process.


We value a flexible mindset in the face of change, as well as the ability to communicate positively and solve problems with colleagues, over technical perfection.


How to Work (Work Process & Coordination)
- Flexible feedback process with the Korean branch: Communicate and coordinate closely with the Korean team to concretize the advertising concept. Aim for a flexible working environment, ready to receive feedback and quickly improve resources.
- Production process from video to playable: Possessing a seamless production pipeline: verify the appeal of the advertisement first through video, then build it up into a playable that can be manipulated directly.
- Colleague-oriented communication: We value a 'positive attitude' as much as technical skills. Encourage open sharing of ideas between planners and developers, and prioritize a culture of proactively finding solutions together even in difficult situations.


Main job
- Implement Visual concept: Realistically visualize the "core fun" elements of the playable ad through video first.
-Produce resources for game-style ads: Based on the deployed video, produce 2D/3D graphic resources (characters, background, UI/UX, etc.) necessary for playable ads that users can manipulate directly.
- Set up Art Guide: Build and manage overall art style to maintain the visual perfection of the ad.


Additional notes
- This position is a key role, determining the visual quality of playable-based video ads and playable ads.
- Not a developer position working directly with Unity, but will coordinate with the production team to create 2D/3D resources used in the actual playable.
- Is the position responsible for the level of visual perfection of art for promotional videos and actionable game-style ads.
Job requirements

- [Required] Ability to communicate positively, flexibly respond to changes and be able to cooperate happily with colleagues.
- [Required] Must use Blender, have experience using other 3D modeling tools.
- Ability to use video production and editing tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects to effectively visualize advertising concepts.
- Understand the resource structure of the Unity engine and be able to work together (at a basic setup level).
- Have good communication ability.
- Required to submit Portfolio (including advertising products or game art).


Priority
- Experience in producing art resources for advertising or hyper casual games.
- Able to use 2D & motion tools such as Photoshop, Illustrator, Spine, After Effects, etc.
- Ability to use video production tools such as Premiere Pro, etc.
- Experience in advertising production for global service.


Required documents
- CV and Work Experience Description (PDF).
- Portfolio (Must include art works for games and advertising).

title: Operations Specialist (NOC)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN VINSMART FUTURE
job_description:
Job description
ABOUT LOCATION
Participate in 24/7 monitoring of technology applications and services, detect problems early, handle according to procedures and coordinate with relevant parties to maintain the best user experience. This is an opportunity for in-depth development in the field of system operations, applications and large-scale technology infrastructure.
PRIMARY RESPONSIBILITIES
• Monitor realtime dashboard, alerts, logs and operating status of assigned applications.
• Receive, verify and record the initial incident on the ticketing system.
• Classify problem level P0/P1/P2/P3 according to operating procedures.
• Implement basic processing checklist within the scope of authorized L1/App NOC.
• Escalate to the L2/L3 route including DevOps, Application Operations, SRE, Engineering or vendor.
• Track SLA, timeline, owner and processing status until the incident is handed over or closed.
• Update runbook, checklist, shift log and shift handover records fully and accurately.
• Coordinate with Customer Service, Product, Tech and Ops to determine the level of impact to users/operations.
• Record recurring errors, interference warnings and operational bottlenecks to suggest improvements.
Job requirements

REQUEST
• Graduated from College/University in IT, Information Systems, Computer Engineering or related field.
• Have 1–3 years of experience in NOC, IT Operations, Application Operations, Helpdesk, Technical Support or equivalent position.
• Experience in monitoring dashboard, alert, log, ticketing system.
• Know how to use or have the ability to quickly learn tools such as Grafana, Datadog, ELK/Kibana, Prometheus, Zabbix, Jira Service Desk.
• Ability to read and understand basic logs, error messages, metrics, API status to verify initial problems.
• Understand the basic process of incident handling, escalation, SLA tracking, shift handover.
• English to read and understand technical documents at a basic to good level.
• Willing to work shifts if required by the operating model.
• Be careful, disciplined, and react quickly in the operating environment.
• Communicate clearly and concisely when there is an incident or escalation.
• Have a spirit of ownership, monitor incidents until they are handed over or closed.
• Withstand pressure in incident situations that affect users.
• Have a service mindset, prioritizing system stability and user experience.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (Team Lead)
company: Công ty TNHH Phần mềm HICAS
job_description:
Job description
HICAS — Where technology creates value
Do you want to expand your influence from writing code to leading teams, participating in architectural decisions, and building products that have real impact on the business?
HICAS is looking for a Senior Fullstack Developer (Team Lead) to work with the Engineering team to develop software platforms and AI-Ready solutions for the fields of Construction & Mechanical Engineering, Logistics and Hotel Management — products that serve thousands of users.


*** This position is for you if
• You have 5+ years of Fullstack experience and have led or mentored teams.
• You want to be responsible for the quality of the entire team, not just your own code.
• You want to influence the direction of technology, products and people development.


*** What will you do?
Technical & product orientation
• Design, develop and optimize microservices systems towards AI-Ready, ensuring scalability and stability.
• Work across Backend, Frontend, Database and Cloud; Integrate third-party systems (authentication, payment, IoT...).
• Ensure product quality through testing, code review and CI/CD.
• Participate in architectural & technology decisions; Propose process improvements and promote AI application in products and ways of working.
Lead the team
• Manage and develop a team of 3–6 engineers: assign assignments, track progress and ensure output quality.
• Review code, mentor and build a positive technical culture and coding standards.
Job requirements

We look for candidates with:
• 5+ years of Fullstack development experience; Used to lead or mentor technical teams.
• Master a backend language (.NET Core / Node.js / Python...) and a frontend framework (React is preferred).
• Understand RESTful API, microservices and system design; Proficient in database (PostgreSQL / MySQL / MongoDB).
• Proficient in Docker, CI/CD and cloud (AWS / Azure / GCP).
• Systems thinking, problem solving ability and proactive spirit.
Plus point
Event-Driven Architecture (Kafka, RabbitMQ), DevOps (Kubernetes, observability, monitoring), application security (OAuth2, JWT, RBAC) and experience applying AI in software development.


Why should you choose HICAS?
• True ownership: participate and directly influence key technical decisions — from architecture to technology choices.
• Clear path: opportunity to develop to Technical Lead, Solution Architect or Engineering Manager.
• Modern technology: Cloud, Microservices, Data Platform (Lakehouse), video streaming and AI.
• Income & benefits: compete based on ability, performance evaluation and periodic salary increases.
• Environment: promotes initiative, learning and innovation.


Apply
In addition to your CV, please briefly answer the following 3 questions in your cover letter or application email. This is the section we prioritize reading first to understand how you work in practice:
1. A difficult technical decision you've ever made (architecture, technology, or speed/quality trade-off): context, options you considered, and if you did it again, would you do it differently?
2. Once you handled a difficult situation with a team member (performing below expectations, conflicting opinions, or opposing the direction you chose): what did you do and what was the result?
3. How do you use AI in practice in your work? A specific example: what to use, for what purpose, and the limitations you encounter.
In addition, please indicate your expected salary and available time to accept the job.

title: Senior Operational Risk Management Specialist
job_description:
Job description
JOB DESCRIPTION 


Objective: Implement processes, tools.... on operational risks according to the Company's identified operational risk management framework. Consulting and supporting units in implementing operational risk management. Propose improvement measures. 


Participate in implementing operational risk policies, processes, and tools... such as Operational Risk Self-Assessment (RCSA), key risk index assessments (KRIs), reporting, monitoring loss events (LDC) ... to identify, measure, monitor, control, and minimize operational risks of units; 
Manage and monitor risk events. Work with relevant departments to overcome the consequences of risk events and propose measures to avoid repeating similar risk events;
 Appraise and evaluate operational risks that may arise related to products, processes, business programs, projects, centralized purchasing, propose and recommend appropriate operational risk management measures;
Consulting and supporting units in implementing risk management activities;
Identify and analyze key risks, emerging risks, and potential risks and propose timely blocking and control measures;
Identify and analyze vulnerabilities and weaknesses in the system and propose improvement measures.
Carry out periodic/unscheduled reports on operational risks as assigned; 
Implement training and communication programs on risks;
Other tasks as assigned.

title: [HOT] IT Product/Solution Development Expert
company: Trung Tâm Công Nghệ Thông Tin MobiFone
job_description:
Job description
1. Research, develop strategy and product roadmap: Research the market, customers, competitors and propose a product/IT solution development plan. Plan and build product strategies and product/solution development roadmaps to ensure novelty, competitiveness and meet customer needs.
2. Design & develop products/solutions – Design & develop products/solutions and Implement product/solution development – ​​Product lifecycle management: Propose and deploy ideas → design → test → deploy → operate and improve to ensure progress and product quality.
3. Implement strategic projects: Participate in implementing key IT product/solution development projects (digital government, digital transformation, key applications...).
4. Inter-departmental coordination: Work closely with Sales departments to determine customer needs to serve production and business needs at the center. Participate in presentations and present product development plans to the board of directors and strategic partners.
5. Product performance management: Monitor performance indicators of the product portfolio, analyze data, evaluate business performance and propose upgrading, expanding or discontinuing ineffective products.
Job requirements

1. Professional experience:
– Have at least 05 years of experience in the IT field at large IT corporations or enterprises in Vietnam or enterprises with a staff size of 400 employees or more. Have participated in developing project teams and product development teams for at least 02 IT products/solutions on the market.
– Candidates who have experience leading a team or being a team leader are an advantage.
– Candidates with experience in the fields of digital business, e-government or digital transformation projects for B2B/B2G customers are an advantage.
2. Technical skills: Understanding related technology platforms (software, digital platforms, cloud computing infrastructure, security...) to be able to guide product design. Understanding of product management tools and user data analysis.
3. Other requirements:
– Ability to apply and build software development management processes consistent with IT system deployment requirements in large enterprises and state agencies.
– Good communication and presentation skills, able to explain technical issues to leaders and non-IT partners.
– Able to work independently and coordinate well with other technical groups.
– Good English to read technical documents and exchange international expertise is an advantage.
4. Professional qualifications:
Education: University degree or higher majoring in Information Technology, Computer Science, Mathematics or related fields. Master's degree/Advanced major in Technology or Product Management preferred.
Certificate: Priority given to project management certificate (PMP/Prince2) or professional product management training courses (Product Manager, Scrum Master...). Technology certifications (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud, etc.) are an advantage.


BENEFITS: 
– Competitive income: Attractive salary and bonus, negotiable based on capacity and results. Periodically review and adjust income. Bonus on holidays and year-end.
– Welfare regime: Full social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance according to the Labor Law, with enhanced health insurance. Leave and holidays according to regulations, plus internal benefits (travel, teambuilding, sports festivals, etc.).


Working environment:
– Equipped with tools, software, and modern technology platforms for product development.
– Participate in training and professional development programs (workshop, internal training, learning new technology), have reward policies, and support the cost of studying for advanced international certificates/advanced professional certificates.
– Opportunity to work with large-scale B2G projects, providing products, services or solutions to government agencies and organizations, accessing the latest technology/platform trends.
– Young, dynamic, transparent environment, professional working culture, opportunities to cooperate with strategic partners, domestic and foreign technology corporations.

title: SAP Senior Consultant - SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) Module
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Are you ready to unleash your potential?


At Deloitte, our purpose is to make an impact that matters for our clients, our people, and the communities we serve.
We believe we have a responsibility to be a force for good, and WorldImpact is our portfolio of initiatives focused on making a tangible impact on society’s biggest challenges and creating a better future. We strive to advise clients on how to deliver purpose-led growth and embed more equitable, inclusive as well as sustainable business practices.
Hence, we seek talented individuals driven to excel and innovate, working together to achieve our shared goals.
We are committed to creating positive work experiences that foster a culture of respect and inclusion, where diverse perspectives are celebrated, and everyone is recognized for their contributions.
Ready to unleash your potential with us? Join the winning team now!
Work you will do
This role sits within the SAP team of Deloitte Southeast Asia, which encompasses the SAP Module solutions respectively. As a leader of this group, you will drive the growth of our SAP business in the region and be responsible for the creation, sale and delivery of SAP solutions: Functional and Technical Design, SAP Application & Systems Development, SAP Business Transformation, etc.
•	Engage clients in workshops and interviews to analyze process and reporting requirements
•	Advise clients on industry/ cross-industry leading practices. Advise clients on SAP recommended processes and functions
•	Design target state SAP solutions for clients. Influence clients’ thinking in adopting leading/ standard practices while developing target state
•	Analyze application landscape to design interfaces to SAP solution
•	Perform SAP configuration and tests. Develop specifications for development of forms/ reports/ interfaces.
•	Lead the consultant and client teams through the implementation cycle including planning and execution of testing, migration and cutover.
•	Support change management execution by developing training material, delivering training and supporting users post cutover.
•	Develop relationships with internal and external stakeholders
Your role as a leader:
At Deloitte, we believe in the importance of empowering our people to be leaders at all levels. We connect our purpose and shared values to identify issues as well as to make an impact that matters to our clients, people and the communities. Additionally, Senior Consultants across our Firm are expected to:
•	Actively seek out developmental opportunities for growth, act as strong brand ambassadors for the firm as well as share their knowledge and experience with others.
•	Respect the needs of their colleagues and build up cooperative relationships.
•	Understand the goals of our internal and external stakeholder to set personal priorities as well as align their teams’ work to achieve the objectives.
•	Constantly challenge themselves, collaborate with others to deliver on tasks and take accountability for the results.
•	Build productive relationships and communicate effectively in order to positively influence teams and other stakeholders.
•	Offer insights based on a solid understanding of what makes Deloitte successful.
•	Project integrity and confidence while motivating others through team collaboration as well as recognising individual strengths, differences, and contributions.
•	Understand disruptive trends and promote potential opportunities for improvement.
Yêu cầu công việc

Requirements:
•	A good honors Degree, preferably at postgraduate level, in Information Technology, Business Information Systems, Business, Engineering, Mathematics or related disciplines.
•	Good understanding of SAP implementation methodology.
•	Senior Consultant will require a minimum of 6-8 years of experience in SAP Extended Warehouse Management (EWM) Module, preferably with 4-6 end to end full life cycle SAP EWM Module implementations with team leading experience.
•	SAP S/4 HANA experience is an advantage
•	Demonstrated success in multi-cultural work environment.
•	Sound understanding of business process, industry nuances and leading practices in area of focus
•	Good communication and presentation skills in English to build relationship and work closely with client stakeholders
•	Ability to facilitate effective workshops to lead target state design.
•	Demonstrated excellence in conceiving and executing SAP solution
•	Sound business acumen, teamwork and leadership qualities.
•	Willingness to work outside of office base and most of all
•	An appreciation of the consulting lifestyle and ability to travel (both locally and abroad) is a prerequisite to fit to our short-term and long-term project assignment.


Due to volume of applications, we regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


Please note that Deloitte will never reach out to you directly via messaging platforms to offer you employment opportunities or request for money or your personal information. Kindly apply for roles that you are interested in via this official Deloitte website.

title: Inside Sales Representative (Technical B2B / Industrial Solutions - Relocation to Thailand Required)
location: Quốc tế, Hồ Chí Minh, Hà Nội
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Location: Singha Complex, Bangkok, Thailand (On-site)


Employment Type: 11-Month Contract (Potential Permanent Opportunity)
Working Days: Monday – Friday
Working Hours: Rotational Shift (08:00–17:00 or 09:00–18:00)
Salary Range: Basic 40,000 THB - 45,000 THB + Sales Incentive 10-12% upon successful sale
About the Role
We are looking for a driven and results-oriented Inside Sales Representative to manage the full sales cycle for a technical B2B product portfolio. You will engage decision-makers remotely, build strong customer relationships, and drive revenue growth from prospecting through deal closure.
Key Responsibilities
•	Prospect, qualify, and engage technical and executive stakeholders via phone, email, and digital channels
•	Execute end-to-end sales process — lead generation → discovery → proposal → negotiation → closure
•	Conduct consultative sales conversations with clients
•	Maintain accurate pipeline hygiene and activity logs in CRM (daily)
•	Meet or exceed monthly/quarterly revenue and conversion targets
•	Collaborate with pre-sales, technical, and account management teams to drive deal velocity
•	Prepare and deliver product pitches tailored to technical buyer personas
Yêu cầu công việc

•	Language Requirement: Excellent in Vietnamese and Business-level English proficiency (written and spoken) — mandatory
•	1–3 years of inside sales, technical sales, or B2B sales experience
•	Background in mechanical engineering, industrial equipment, HVAC, manufacturing, or related technical field — preferred but not mandatory
•	Demonstrated ability to engage and influence executive-level contacts
•	Strong listening, objection-handling, and closing skills
•	Business-level English communication skills (spoken and written).
•	Should be open to travel to events/field visits/meet clients, if required. This is a desk job.


Compensation & Benefits
•	Competitive base salary (based on language market and experience).
•	Monthly sales commission (10–12% of base salary) for successful sales performance.
•	Opportunity to grow into a permanent role for high-performing employees.
•	Comprehensive training and onboarding, including field exposure.
Why Join Us?
•	Work with a fast-growing technical B2B portfolio.
•	Own the entire sales cycle and directly impact business growth.
•	Attractive earning potential through performance-based incentives.
•	Collaborative and professional international work environment.
If you are passionate about sales, enjoy building client relationships, and thrive in a target-driven environment, we'd love to hear from you.

title: FPGA Engineer (Chance To Become Leader)
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
• HDL coding such as Verilog, SystemVerilog, VHDL, …
• Investigate, implement and optimize complex algorithms on FPGAs.
• Design and implement digital system on FPGA (Xilinx, Intel Altera).
• Collaborate with firmware and software engineers to develop efficient interfaces and ensure seamless integration between FPGA and other system components.
• Perform detailed analysis, simulation, and verification of FPGA designs to ensure functionality, performance, and compliance with project requirements.
• Prototype and validate FPGA designs using hardware development boards and lab equipment.
• Propose solution architecture for team or customer.
Yêu cầu công việc

YOUR SKILL
Educational background
• Bachelor’s degree or higher in Electronic & Telecommunication, Computer Science, or related fields.
Technical skill
• At least 3 years of experience in FPGA development (academic lab work or hands-on project experience is acceptable).
• Able to use FPGA development tools such as Vivado and Quartus.
• Able to work in Linux environment and develop scripts to support development activities.
• Have knowledge of computer architecture and on-chip bus protocols such as AXI.
• Have experience in digital design, including FSM, CDC, and related concepts.
• Have experience in creating verification environments and test cases, and applying verification methodologies (Assertion, Expected Value Comparison, etc.).
• Have experience in synthesis, timing analysis, constraint management, and resource optimization.
• Have experience in developing software to control and interface with hardware.
• Experience in deployment and debugging on FPGA boards is a plus.
Language skill
• Fluency in English (TOEIC 600 or higher).
• Japanese: JLPT N4 or HIGHER IS A BIG PLUS.
BENEFIT & PERKS
• Being a member of a giant corporation, you will receive following benefit: 
• Salary range: Able to negotiate. Bonus once a year. Incentive twice a year. Total package up to 15 months salary/ year
• High opportunity to be on-site in Japan
• Full Social, Medical & Unemployment Insurance
• Review performance twice a year
• Work in well - equipped and professional IT environment and IT community;
• To be trained and/or instructed by Japanese Specialists in Vietnam as well as in Japan and others;
• Professional Soft-skills and Technical skills

title: IT Inspector Officer
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN VINSMART FUTURE
job_description:
Job description
1. Job description
• Carry out specialized/specialized inspections for departments in the Technology sector to evaluate the quality of project/product implementation. Check compliance with processes, technical standards and internal regulations
• Carry out incident inspections as directed by the Board of Directors (unusual issues related to the system, operations, security, project progress, etc.)
• Identify errors and risks in: Software development process, Data management, system security and System operation.
• Propose plans to handle violations and monitor remediation after inspection as requested by Leadership
• Perform post-audit for units/groups that have self-audited internally, ensuring transparency and efficiency
• Analyze root causes, synthesize lessons learned and propose solutions: Minimize system risks & Optimize operating and product development processes
• Coordinate closely with departments: Engineering, QA, Security, Data... to clarify complex issues
• Make quick, concise, and informative inspection reports in emergency situations (within 4–8 hours)
Job requirements

• Education level: University degree or higher in: Information Technology, Computer Science, Information Systems, Cyber Security or related fields
• Experience: Minimum 5 years of experience in one or more fields: Software Development / QA / System Operation / IT Audit / IT Compliance
• Priority is given to candidates who have worked in: IT Audit / Internal Audit / Risk / Compliance
• Or management/lead positions in large technology companies
• Professional knowledge:
Understand the software development process (Agile/Scrum, CI/CD)
Understand technology systems: Cloud, API, Data pipeline, Security
Have knowledge of internal control and risk management in a technology environment
• Skills:
Analytical thinking, good logic, ability to analyze problems in depth
Skills to quickly investigate, collect and verify information
Write clear, concise, focused reports
Ability to work under high pressure and handle emergency situations
• Special requirements:
Ability to complete inspection reports in a short time (4–8 hours) with high accuracy
High integrity, objectivity, and independence in assessment

title: VN Finance Manager
company: Công Ty TNHH Thiết Kế Hệ Thống Corsair
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
General Purpose:
Overall manage Corsair Design Systems Ltd's accounting and finance operation locally, be the contact point of 3rd party accounting firm, review journal entries and transactions and reporting, manage the local tax matters, and assist Controller to improve internal controls for local operations, in line with Corporate Policies and Procedures and adhering to Local and US GAAP accounting standards.


Position Summary, Responsibilities and Expectations:
• Monitor the accounting firm close the book on HQ closing schedule, review Journal Entry as the 1st approver in Oracle for all entries posted by 3rd party accounting firm.
• Be the internal owner of BS and accounting, answer HQ and KPMG global audit's query on timely basis.
• Be the bridge of Controller and 3rd party accounting firm, follow up instructions of Controller to improve internal control, solve business operation problems, and support cost saving actions if any.
• Involve deeply into local operation, check the authenticity, reasonableness and completeness of the original Vietnamese invoices, receipts, contracts, report to Controller if any doubtful expenses, collect and deliver these originals documents for accounting firm's booking.
• Be the coordinator of local annual statutory auditing, review final statutory reports, understand any variance between Oracle and statutory report, work with local Chief Accountant for annual CIT filling.
• With the support of accounting firm and local Chief Accountant, follow up local VAT refund from local tax authorities.
• Review the accounting firms local Vietnamese tax report and make sure local tax declaration are accurate, approve tax payment request from accounting firm. Make sure the accounting firm reconcile any tax variance between local ledger and Oracle ledger, report to HQ tax leader for any issues.
• Be the payroll focal point, collect any salary movement information from HR and deliver to 3rd party accounting firm, prepare reconciliation for monthly movement for Controller's review, report timely if investigate any abnormal items.
• Support global Treasury on local bank administration related matters (director changes, address changers, close/open local banks under instructions etc..).
• Under the instructions of HQ Tax, manage the local Transfer Pricing billing and submit funds transfer request to Treasury, prepare cash flow budget for working capital monthly.
• Represent Corsair Finance for interactions with Government, Tax authorities and any external service providers.
• Any ad hoc projects required by management.
Yêu cầu công việc

• Bachelor degree majoring in Accounting or Finance, with VN qualified accounting certification. ACCA or CPA is a plus.
• At least 10 years working experience, including 5 years working experience in accounting/finance within VN branches of large foreign enterprise, the working language is English.
• At least 2~3 years of experience as accounting/finance manager or Chief Accountant, overall in-charge experience is preferred, with strong hands-on operational involvement and ability to work closely with local business team.
• Solid accounting knowledge, have good understanding Vietnam tax policy and regulations.
• Good skill in Excel, accounting ERP (Oracle experience is preferred).
• Good command writing and speaking English for daily reporting, can speak Chinese is a plus.
• Good interpersonal and communication skills, able to communicate efficiently cross function to drive things happen.
• A good team player, reliable, self-initiative and well credibility, with high loyalty to the company.

job_description:
Mô tả công việc
Expect more. Connect more. Be more at Diebold Nixdorf. Our teams automate, digitize, and transform the way more than 75 million people around the globe bank and shop in this hyper-connected, consumer-centric world. Join us in connecting people to commerce in this vital, rewarding role


At Diebold Nixdorf, we transform the way over 75 million people around the world bank and shop. We are global leaders in connected commerce, enabling seamless, secure, and modern customer experiences across the financial and retail sectors. Our portfolio includes advanced self-service technologies (ATMs, POS terminals), software platforms, cybersecurity, and managed services.


Join us as we drive the future of banking building deep client partnerships and delivering cutting-edge solutions that power commerce across the globe.


We are seeking a Senior Account Manager to lead our strategic sales and account development efforts in the Vietnam banking sector. This high-impact role requires a seasoned enterprise sales leader with deep industry knowledge and a proven ability to build long-term C-level client relationships, drive digital transformation agendas, and consistently deliver on aggressive sales targets.


The successful candidate will own the full P&L of assigned banking accounts, manage the complete solution selling cycles, and orchestrate multi-disciplinary teams to deliver end-to-end value across our hardware, software and services solutions. The Sales shall be executed through our established partner ecosystem.


Key Responsibilities 
•	Own the end-to-end sales lifecycle from prospecting to closing, while managing and expanding existing top-tier banking relationships.
•	Develop and execute a strategic, territory-specific go-to-market plan to identify, prioritize, and convert high-potential enterprise accounts.
•	Drive Diebold Nixdorf solution selling through value-based business cases, competitive positioning, and C-level engagements.
•	Build and maintain a robust pipeline through customer engagements, partner collaboration and deep market insight.
•	Execute territory research and whitespace analysis to uncover upsell, cross-sell, and transformation opportunities within existing accounts.
•	Maintain accurate CRM forecasting, pipeline hygiene, and activity tracking through the Salesforce platform.
•	Lead internal deal governance processes while engaging stakeholders across product, legal, services, and delivery.
•	Oversee customer success and post-sale service quality by aligning with internal delivery and technical teams.
•	Represent DN’s vision and product roadmap to clients, positioning the full suite of DN solutions to solve customer business problems.
Yêu cầu công việc

•	15+ years of enterprise solution sales experience, including direct sales of banking solutions or digital transformation solutions.
•	Proven success in consistently exceeding quota and revenue targets within sales cycles.
•	Demonstrated ability to sell into financial institutions in Vietnam, particularly with C-level executives across both IT and business lines.
•	Deep domain knowledge of Vietnam’s Banking Sector with focus on banking center operations, self-service technologies (ATMs, POS), and digital banking platforms.
•	Strong business acumen, negotiation skills, and experience managing large value deals.
•	Exceptional strategic account planning and execution capabilities.
•	Strong consultative sales skills, including the ability to articulate ROI and business value to diverse decision-making units.
•	Resilient, self-driven, and adaptable in high-pressure, high-performance environments.
•	Demonstrated ability to collaborate effectively across internal cross- functional teams and partner ecosystems within a dynamic, matrixed organizational environment.
•	Fluent in English (spoken and written) and Vietnamese
•	Bachelor’s degree required; MBA preferred.




Why Diebold Nixdorf?
•	Join a market leader driving digital transformation across financial services.
•	Lead strategic client relationships at the executive level.
•	Work with a world-class portfolio of solutions that shape the future of commerce.
•	Be empowered with autonomy, resources, and opportunities for regional career growth.
•	Competitive compensation with performance-based rewards and benefits.
Ready to Make an Impact?
If you’re a bold, results-driven enterprise sales leader with deep banking industry knowledge and a passion for driving strategic transformation—apply now andbe part of the future of connected commerce at Diebold Nixdorf.

title: Edge Engineer (Embedded & Device Integration) Device Integration Programming Engineer
job_description:
Job description
We are looking for an Edge Engineer with a strong background in embedded programming, device communication, and edge-to-cloud system integration in the satellite and Ground Station sectors. You will act as a connection between hardware/RF devices, antenna systems, telemetry equipment, ground station software and backend cloud platform to ensure data is transmitted and received stably, realtime and reliably.
This is a position for people who like to work closely with real devices, are interested in low-level debugging, understand protocol/networking and want to build mission-critical systems that operate 24/7.
Main responsibilities
• Develop software for edge devices and device communication systems. 
• Integrate and work with antenna controllers, modems, telemetry devices, RF equipment, SDR devices and industrial hardware. 
• Build data pipeline between hardware/device, ground station agent and backend cloud platform. 
• Design and develop driver wrapper, protocol adapter, telemetry collector and edge communication services. 
• Work with protocols such as TCP/IP, UDP, Serial (UART/RS232/RS485), WebSocket, MQTT and gRPC. 
• Handles realtime telemetry, streaming data, reconnect/retry, fault tolerance and offline buffering. 
• Debug issues related to network, packet loss, latency, hardware communication and device interoperability. 
• Optimize performance and stability for edge systems that operate continuously 24/7. 
• Collaborate with backend engineers, RF engineers, system architects and DevOps engineers to design end-to-end systems.
Job requirements

Requires skills
Required
• Experience in Embedded Software, Edge Computing, Device Integration, Distributed Systems, serial communication, TCP/UDP socket and realtime data streaming. 
• Proficient in at least one language: C/C++, Python or Java. 
• Understand the Linux system, including process, threading, socket, memory and service management. 
• Ability to debug at a low level related to network packets, device communication, protocol issues and hardware integration. 
• Understand data flow from edge/device → ground station → cloud backend. 
Plus point
• Experience with SDR, RF systems, telemetry systems, satellite communication systems or antenna systems. 
• Knowing or having worked with Docker, Kubernetes, Kafka, Prometheus and Grafana is an advantage. 
What do we look for?
We look for people who love working with real devices instead of just pure software, have the ability to research new protocols or hardware on their own, and are not afraid to debug difficult low-level problems. You need to have high ownership, strong engineering mindset, like to build systems from scratch and care about reliability in real operating environments.
You will have your chance
• Participate in building the Ground Station system for the satellite sector. 
• Work with realtime telemetry, distributed systems, edge-to-cloud architecture and RF/device communication. 
• Participate in designing the technical architecture instead of just implementing the task. 
• Work in a high-speed product engineering environment with many new and highly complex technical problems.

title: Senior Backend Engineer (Fullstack: Cloud, Backend, Frontend, Edge Device)
job_description:
Job description
We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer with a strong systems mindset, not only developing backend API but also understanding the entire flow from frontend → backend → edge/device → cloud infrastructure. This is not a position that only "codes on a task", but will directly participate in designing and building systems to serve the satellite and ground station sectors, where software needs to operate stably in realtime, distributed and mission-critical environments.
We prioritize candidates with fullstack thinking, understand end-to-end products, proactively solve problems, and know how to take advantage of AI tools like Claude Code or ChatGPT to accelerate engineering productivity. At the same time, be ready to read logs, debug the network and work with edge/device when needed.
Main responsibilities:
• Design and develop backend services for ground station platform, telemetry systems, mission control systems, device management systems and cloud platform. 
• Build RESTful APIs, realtime communication services, event-driven architecture and distributed systems. 
• Work with PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka/message broker, object storage and observability stack. 
• Develop realtime telemetry processing, command execution pipeline, scheduling and monitoring systems. 
• Collaborate with frontend, edge, RF and DevOps engineers to design end-to-end systems. 
• Support frontend/webapp development as needed, including dashboard, UI operations and realtime visualization. 
• Participate in integration with edge/device layer such as telemetry ingestion, device communication, protocol integration and realtime streaming. 
• Apply AI-assisted development workflow to support more effective development, refactoring, debugging and documentation.




Job requirements

Mandatory requirement
• Strong experience in backend development, proficient in Java and Spring Boot. 
• Understand distributed systems, microservices, event-driven architecture and async processing. 
• Experience working with PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka or similar message brokers. 
• Master Linux, Docker and networking fundamentals. 
• Ability to troubleshoot logs, API issues, performance bottlenecks and distributed tracing. 
• Have fullstack thinking, understand frontend flow, API contracts and UX for operational systems. 
• Experience or willingness to work with telemetry systems, realtime streaming and edge/device integration. 
• Proactively use AI tools to increase productivity engineering. 
Plus point
• Experience with Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, CI/CD, Prometheus/Grafana and ELK/OpenSearch. 
• Participated in developing IoT systems, telemetry systems, realtime systems, mission-critical systems or edge-to-cloud architecture. 
• Able to support frontend tasks with React, TypeScript or realtime dashboard. 
• Understand TCP/UDP, WebSocket, MQTT and gRPC. 
• Have good architectural and system design thinking. 


What do we look for?
We look for people with high ownership and the ability to look at the problem end-to-end instead of just focusing on a small service. You love building products from scratch, are not afraid of complex systems, unclear requirements and are always willing to self-study and adapt to new technology. At the same time, pay attention to scalability, reliability, maintainability and engineering excellence during the product development process.
You will have your chance
• Participate in building platforms to serve the satellite and ground station sectors. 
• Work with realtime telemetry, distributed systems, edge-to-cloud architecture and mission-critical infrastructure. 
• Approach a highly complex engineering environment, combining backend, edge, networking, cloud infrastructure and operational systems. 
• Participate in system architecture design instead of just feature implementation. 
• Work in a product-oriented and deep technology engineering team.

title: General Human Resources Administration Specialist
job_description:
Job description
Recruitment & Training:
- In charge of the entire recruitment process: building JD, posting information on channels, filtering CVs, conducting direct interviews (including English interviews) and evaluating candidates.
- Implement procedures for receiving new personnel (Onboarding) and monitor and evaluate during the probationary period.


C&B work (Compensation & Benefits):
- Carry out timekeeping, salary calculation, bonuses and answer questions related to policies and benefits for employees.
- In charge of operations on social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance (increase/decrease reporting, closing books, handling sickness and maternity benefits...).
- Drafting labor contracts, personnel decisions (appointment, dismissal, resignation...) and storing scientific personnel records.
- Coordinate with the Accounting department to process payroll, personal income tax declaration and manage revenues and expenditures, invoices related to Administration - Human Resources.


Administration & Labor Relations:
- Manage and monitor annual leave and spiritual life of employees; Maintain company regulations and handle labor relations issues (reminders, discipline...).
- Come up with ideas and organize internal communication events: Birthdays, Team building, Company Trip, periodic health checks...
- Perform office administrative tasks: distribute uniforms, manage equipment, stationery, contact partners for quotes and other support tasks as required.
- Draft administrative documents and prepare periodic reports
Job requirements

- Graduated from College/University majoring in Human Resources Management, Business Administration or equivalent Human Resources vocational certificates.
- Have 2 - 4 years of experience in a general Human Resources position (priority is given to candidates with experience in independently handling C&B and Recruitment fields).
- Thorough understanding of current Labor Law, regulations on social insurance and personal income tax.
- Fluent in English (especially the ability to interview and discuss work in English).
- Skillful communication, problem solving and work organization skills.
- Personality: Confidential information, careful, honest and has a high sense of responsibility.


BENEFITS:
- Salary: Negotiable commensurate with actual capacity.
- Review development roadmap and periodically evaluate salary increases based on capacity.
- Full participation in social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance according to law + 24/7 accident insurance.
- Friendly and open working environment; Participate in professional development training courses.
- Annual trip, Team building, health check, and other company benefits.

title: Advertising Monetization Specialist
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
We are seeking an expert with a deep understanding of the mobile advertising ecosystem to serve as the 'architect' of our ad revenue streams. You will not only execute technical setups but also shape sustainable growth strategies, optimizing the balance between user experience and profitability for Athena's top game titles


KEY JOB DUTIES
1. Monitoring & Analysis: Track, analyze, and report on key daily metrics such as ROAS, ARPDAU, LTV, eCPM, Fill Rate, and Impressions for key game titles.
2. Revenue Optimization: Manage and optimize the performance of our ad network partners. Directly set up and fine-tune ad waterfalls and conduct A/B tests to maximize revenue. Take full accountability for Price Floor strategies and ad layering to maximize competition among Network partners.
3. Product Thinking & Strategic Consulting: Act as a strategic advisor to the Product and Game Design teams from the early stages of development to create innovative ad formats (placements, formats, frequency) naturally and effectively to grow revenue without negatively impacting user retention. Deeply analyze the impact of advertising on Retention and Churn rates to ensure long-term Lifetime Value (LTV) growth.
4. Strategic Partner Management: Negotiate preferential terms and gain early access to Beta features from major partners. Build and maintain strong, professional relationships with ad network and publisher partners.
5. Forecasting & Troubleshooting: Evaluate, anticipate, and identify potential issues affecting ad revenue and proactively implement solutions.
6. Market Research & Intelligence: Continuously research the market, monitor new advertising trends in the mobile gaming industry, and track competitor activities to implement best practices.
Yêu cầu công việc

EXPERIENCE & KNOWLEDGE:
• 6+ years of experience in a similar role (e.g., Ads Monetization, User Acquisition, Performance Marketing…).
• Solid knowledge of the mobile game market, especially the Free-to-Play (F2P) model and performance marketing techniques.
• Hands-on experience with major Ad Network and Mediation platforms (e.g., Google AdMob, IronSource, AppLovin MAX, etc.).
• An understanding of game economy and how advertising impacts user behavior is a strong plus.
SKILL:
• Toeic >700, fluent in English (both written and verbal) for effective communication with international partners.
• Excellent data analysis skills: Proficient in analyzing key metrics (Impressions, Fill Rate, eCPM, ARPDAU) and capable of translating data into actionable insights and recommendations.
• Strong coordination skills, with the ability to sync tasks and information across multiple teams (Product, Marketing, Tech).
ABILITIES:
• Logical, data-driven mindset with a passion for working with numbers.
• Root-cause problem solving & critical thinking.
• High emotional intelligence.
• High attention to detail (especially when checking revenue, setting up waterfalls, and managing A/B tests).
• Proactive, eager to learn, and consistently staying on top of new trends in digital advertising.
• A team player dedicated to providing a high level of service to all stakeholders.
• A genuine passion for the gaming industry, especially mobile games.


WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE
•	Professional, creative working environment and talented teams, equal-opportunities & agile culture
•	Great facility to work. You will have a MacBook and extra high definition screens
•	Electrical standing desk for most comfortable seat
•	Annual leave 12 days / sick leave 2 days / remote work 12 days / anniversary leave 1 day

•	Reward program for engaged activities and volunteering
•	Annual company trip & quarter team bonding activities
•	Happy hours and awesome parties

•	With regular discussions, you will have a lot of opportunities to learn from experts in their fields

KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES
• Initiate, drive process rigor and accuracy, execute and manage compliance under Corporate Law & Other Laws.
• Compliances and liaising with relevant ministries and governing bodies and other statutory authorities.
• Convening Board/Members Council Meetings, Preparing entire Agenda, notice for Board and its Committee Meetings.
• Preparing Minutes and ensuring post-meeting compliances.
• Preparation of Director’s report and compilation of data therein for Annual Report.
• Implementing of Corporate Governance processes in alignment with local and NAB requirements.
• Supporting compliance with all statutory requirements and working with internal and external agencies to carry out legal compliance audits.
• Guide other functional members on corporate governance issues related to document management, litigation holds, litigation strategy, and document management process improvements.
• Anticipate and drive solutions for a diverse range of legal and business issues.
• Advise Board of Directors on key managerial and corporate governance issues.
• Training Directors on corporate governance principles.

KEY EXPERIENCE AND QUALIFICATION
Essential capabilities
•	Excellent communication, stakeholder engagement (senior management) influencing, negotiation and management skills
•	Ability to successfully work in cross-functional teams

•	Organising Member’s Council meetings
Qualification Requirements

title: Head Of Reporting, Governance Program Execution And Third-Party Risk Management
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
ABOUT THE JOB
The role provides senior leadership for NAB's Vietnam-based T&EO Reporting & Insights, Governance Program Execution and TPRM teams with people leadership as the primary responsibility. Build a high performing, collaborative and learning focused team, providing strong on site leadership and delivery oversight across end to end management information, governance and reporting. This enables effective tracking of progress against T&EO strategy, risk and regulatory commitments, including oversight of the TPRM assessment team to ensure third party risk assessments are delivered with consistent quality, timeliness and rigour.


MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES: 
•	Co-ordination of activities used to track progress across T&EO risk and compliance activities, including TPRM assessment and governance program execution. 
•	Translating data and analysis to promote actionable insights and business value. Review and challenge management information. 
•	Lead, develop and mentor a high-performing team of professionals. 
•	Ensure timely delivery and risk-based assessment of vendors. 
•	Ability to identify gaps in data quality and governance adherence and drive corrective action / uplift of data gathering, reporting and quality of data through leaders. 
•	Coaches and uplifts capability across onshore/offshore teams. 
•	Drives a culture of challenge, ownership and continuous improvement across the organisation
•	Delivery of agreed outcomes/initiatives on-time and to a very high standard. 
•	Complete, timely and accurate distilling of management information. 
•	90 Day planning and prioritisation. 
•	Colleague engagement and stakeholder satisfaction. 
•	Issues and actions tracked across various initiatives.
Yêu cầu công việc

YOUR SKILLS & EXPERIENCE
•	8 to 10 + years experience in reporting, governance, risk management or related disciplines. 
•	Demonstrated experience operating in large complex organisations preferably within banking or financial services. 
•	Experience supporting or coordinating audit, regulatory or assurance activities. 
•	Exposure to enterprise risk themes such as data governance, operational resilience, third party and regulatory remediation. 
•	Experience leading teams across distributed operating environments 
•	Demonstrated ability to interpret internal policy, standards and regulatory obligations and translate into clear, practical outcomes for senior stakeholders. 
•	Ability to analyse complex data, identify root-causes of issues, challenge information quality and develop practical risk aware solutions 
•	Demonstrated resilience, prioritisation and execution capability in large, regulated and fast paced environments with competing demands. Distribute organisational resources in a way that aligns to strategic plans and priorities. 
•	Ability to identify opportunities to simplify workstreams, improve governance hygiene and uplift productivity through better data, processes or tooling. 
•	Proven senior people leadership of large, multi-disciplinary offshore teams with a primary focus of capability uplift, engagement and retention. 
•	Advocates cross-functional analysis of problems, encouraging cooperation across functions on key decisions using quality data and metrics. 
•	Strong communication skills and ability to influence and interact with senior stakeholders, including Board and C-Suite executives. 
•	Strong capability in third party risk, including oversight of assessment activity and ability to provide meaningful risk insights to support


THE BENEFITS AND PERKS
1. Attractive compensation and benefit package
2. Exciting career and development opportunities
3. Professional and engaging working environment
•	Hybrid working model and excellent work-life balance
•	Well-equipped & modern Agile office

title: L&D Specialist (Training and Development Specialist)
job_description:
Job description
- Participate in building capacity frameworks and training roadmaps for positions at assigned units.
- Receive training proposals and do needs analysis (TNA) to design and implement programs and courses suitable for the unit and closely follow the human resource strategy.
- Proactively organize, deploy and evaluate the effectiveness of training programs & propose improvements (Integration training for new employees, professional training, management skills training...)
- Operate the LMS system for training and suggest improvements.
Job requirements

- Graduated from University or higher with majors: Human Resource Management, Business Administration
- Priority is given to candidates who graduated from schools: Foreign Trade University, National Economics University, National University, University of Commerce, RMIT, VINUNI or graduated abroad
- Minimum 2 years of HR experience, of which at least 1 year in an L&D or Talent development position or undertaking tasks related to employee capacity development...
- Priority is given to working at technology companies with > 500 employees
- Smart, quick-witted; Drastic, Logical thinking; Growth mindset, Creativity, Knowledge of training models such as ADDIE, 70-20-10..., Knowledge of ROI training effectiveness measurement models, Kirkpatrick...
Skills in surveying and analyzing training needs
Skills in using tools: MS Office, Canva, AI tools
Skills in designing training programs and materials
Communication and presentation skills


BENEFITS
Competitive treatment & Value recognition
- Negotiable salary, evaluated and considered for annual adjustment based on effectiveness and strategic contribution.
- Periodic health check-up care, team building activities, sports - cultural clubs, and diverse internal entertainment programs.
Pioneering Digital Transformation in Financial Management
- Contribute to the national mission: Directly contribute to digital transformation, creating real value for society and the community.
- At MISA, you will work in a pioneering environment applying AI technology in Talent Attraction. We provide modern tools such as personal Digital Signature accounts, ChatGPT, AI tools... to help you optimize productivity, automate management processes and improve work efficiency.
- Professional, dynamic environment with open communication culture, youthful leadership, friendly colleagues, always supporting and encouraging innovation.
- Methodical working processes, strategic products with a clear long-term vision, creating a solid foundation for personal and business development.
- Fully equipped with working facilities: computer, card, phone SIM,... ensuring the best support for work.
Career development and roadmap
- MISA invests in the development of each individual and organization through in-depth training and leadership skills programs, as well as opportunities to learn directly from a network of reputable experts and leaders.
- With a clear career development path, each individual will have space to contribute and lead strategic projects, becoming an indispensable part of the company's sustainable development journey.


Working time:
- From May 1 to November 30: Monday to Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:30 p.m. (lunch break 12:00 p.m.–1:30 p.m.); Saturday mornings are flexible according to requirements and work progress
- From December 1 to April 30: Monday to Friday, 8:00 a.m.–5:30 p.m. (lunch break 12:00 p.m.–1:30 p.m.); Saturday morning work from 8:00 a.m. to 12:00 p.m

title: Head Of Product Delivery And Operations
job_description:
Mô tả công việc
ABOUT THE JOB 
The role will lead and develop a high-performing, multi-disciplinary team in Vietnam that delivers technology transformation, data governance, product compliance, and change support across NAB's Financial Crime Transformation function. 
Responsible for embedding a culture of accountability, continuous improvement, and service reliability — ensuring Financial Crime platforms remain operationally sound, regulatory obligations are met, and incremental change is delivered effectively. 
Operating as the senior leader for the Vietnam function, the role bridges offshore delivery capability with Australian-based product, and domain delivery teams — providing stable, scalable, and high-quality support across five functional chapters.


MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES: 
•	Lead and develop five chapters: Data Risk Management, Business Analysis, Product Chapter, PMO, and Product Monitoring, setting clear performance expectations and fostering a culture of quality and continuous improvement 
•	Manage the triage, impact assessment, communication, and resolution of data quality incidents, ensuring appropriate governance, escalation, and stakeholder notification 
•	Ensure Financial Crime products maintain ongoing compliance with regulatory obligations, design standards, and agreed operational parameters 
•	Provide product support partnering with Australian and India-based product teams to plan, test, and deliver high-quality incremental change 
•	Ensure the BA chapter delivers structured requirements, well-formed user stories, and adequate test coverage across all change activities 
•	Monitor and report on Financial Crime product performance and AI model health, translating data into clear insights and risk signals 
•	Represent the Vietnam team in governance forums and performance reviews with Australian leadership, providing transparent reporting on team output and service levels 
•	Partner with Australian product, risk, and operations leads to align Vietnam team priorities with broader transformation objectives
Yêu cầu công việc

YOUR SKILLS & EXPERIENCE 
•	8+ years in financial services, transformation, technology operations, or risk management roles 
•	Demonstrated experience managing data quality, data governance, or data controls functions 
•	Proven track record leading cross-functional teams in delivery or operational environments 
•	Experience with product management, business analysis, or change delivery in regulated industries 
•	Strong understanding of financial crime domains (AML/CTF, Sanctions) preferred 
•	Familiarity with AI/ML model monitoring or analytics functions advantageous 
•	Offshore leadership or global/distributed delivery experience preferred 
•	Tertiary qualification in Business, Technology, or related discipline


ESSENTIAL CAPABILITIES
•	Leadership - Proven ability to build, develop, and retain high-performing teams across geographically dispersed, multi-functional teams and maintains high-quality service delivery across complex operational environments. 
•	Data Governance & Incident Management - Deep understanding of data controls, data quality frameworks, data lineage, and end-to-end incident triage, impact assessment, and resolution. 
•	Product & Compliance Mindset - Ensures Financial Crime product operations align with regulatory obligations and product design intent; proactive in identifying and escalating compliance risks. 
•	Stakeholder Engagement - Effective communicator able to engage Australian-based product owners, risk partners, and senior leadership with clarity and credibility. 
•	Commercial Awareness - Understands program finances, resource management, and value-for-money principles across a multi-chapter operating model. 


THE BENEFITS AND PERKS
1. Attractive compensation and benefit package
2. Exciting career and development opportunities
3. Professional and engaging working environment
•	Hybrid working model and excellent work-life balance
•	Well-equipped & modern Agile office
•	Special programs to improve your physical and mental health

title: Director of Cloud Operations
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN VINSMART FUTURE
job_description:
Job description
I. Position target
Responsible for managing, operating and optimizing the Cloud platform, ensuring information technology infrastructure and services operate stably, safely and effectively, meeting requirements for availability, performance, security and compliance.


II. Main responsibilities
1. Operate the Cloud platform
• Build and manage operations of Cloud and Multi-Cloud platforms.
• Ensure availability, performance, scalability and stability of the infrastructure.
• Manage network infrastructure, compute resources, storage, IAM, and platform services.
• Organize monitoring, alerting and troubleshooting to meet SLA/SLO commitments.


2. Administration, Safety and Service Optimization
• Develop and implement Cloud governance, security and compliance policies.
• Manage backups, disaster recovery (DR) and ensure service continuity.
• Monitor, control and optimize Cloud usage costs (FinOps).
• Coordinate with relevant departments to standardize CI/CD, Kubernetes, automate operations and improve service quality.


3. Team management
• Develop plans, organize and assign work to the Cloud operations team.
• Training, developing professional capacity and effectively managing the work of personnel.
• Develop operating procedures, standards and documents.
Job requirements

• University graduate majoring in IT, Telecommunications or related field.
• Minimum 5 years of experience in IT/Cloud infrastructure and at least 2 years of management experience.
• Experience with AWS, Azure, GCP or Multi-Cloud environments.
• Understanding of Kubernetes, Containers, Infrastructure as Code, Monitoring and Automation.
• Have knowledge of Cloud Security, Governance, FinOps and Disaster Recovery.
• Good leadership, project management, risk management and troubleshooting skills.
