title: Risk Management Expert
job_description:
Job description
1. Building and Developing Governance Framework:
• Establish, build and update Governance Frameworks (Enterprise Risk, Compliance, Ethics); Develop risk portfolio/compliance obligations, code of conduct, fraud prevention policy, conflict of interest control and whistleblower/whistleblower protection mechanisms.
2. Training and Implementation Instructions:
• Organize training and guidance on risk management operations; Coordinate with departments (Legal, Human Resources, Internal Communications) to disseminate legal obligations, ethical standards and build a culture of integrity throughout the Group.
3. Integration into operation:
• Support and coordinate the integration of risk management, compliance and ethics requirements into business processes, internal regulations, business plans, decentralization and actual operating tools at the units.
4. Risk monitoring:
• Carry out periodic review and supervision; Line 1 criticism in risk identification and assessment; Monitor warning indicators (KRIs), compliance violations, ethics/fraud incidents, and emerging risk trends.
5. Monitoring and Reporting:
• Receive, classify and coordinate verification of key cases (fraud, conflicts of interest, compliance/ethics violations); Monitor progress in implementing corrective and preventive action plans and correcting control gaps.
6. Analysis and Improvement:
• Synthesize and analyze a comprehensive risk picture (including business, legal and ethical risks) to report to the Executive Board/Board of Directors; Proposing improvements to methods, tools and management mechanisms to optimize control effectiveness.
Job requirements

• Graduated from university or higher majoring in Economics, Finance, Accounting - Auditing, Business Administration, Law
• Minimum 05 years of experience related to risk management, compliance, business ethics, or related fields such as internal control, internal audit, legal, human resources, finance, operations, process management, management data analysis, fraud prevention, internal investigation.
• Have a systematic understanding of:
+ Enterprise risk management (ERM), 3 lines of defense model, risk appetite, risk portfolio, KRI, and risk reporting mechanism.
+ Compliance risk management based on legal obligations and internal regulations
+ Business ethics and culture of integrity
+ Understanding of COSO ERM, ISO 31000,...
• Read and understand English documents well
• Priority is given to candidates with CRMA and CIA certificates
• Priority is given to candidates who have worked at technology companies, SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, finance, auditing, risk management consulting at Big4 companies.


BENEFITS:
Competitive treatment & Value recognition
- Negotiable salary, evaluated and considered for annual adjustment based on effectiveness and strategic contribution.
- Periodic health check-up care, team building activities, sports - cultural clubs, and diverse internal entertainment programs.
Pioneering Digital Transformation in Financial Management
- Contribute to the national mission: Directly contribute to digital transformation, creating real value for society and the community.
- At MISA, you will work in a pioneering environment applying AI technology in Talent Attraction. We provide modern tools such as personal Digital Signature accounts, ChatGPT, AI tools... to help you optimize productivity, automate management processes and improve work efficiency.
- Professional, dynamic environment with open communication culture, youthful leadership, friendly colleagues, always supporting and encouraging innovation.
- Methodical working processes, strategic products with a clear long-term vision, creating a solid foundation for personal and business development.
- Fully equipped with working facilities: computer, card, phone SIM,... ensuring the best support for work.
Career development and roadmap
- MISA invests in the development of each individual and organization through in-depth training and leadership skills programs, as well as opportunities to learn directly from a network of reputable experts and leaders.
- With a clear career development path, each individual will have space to contribute and lead strategic projects, becoming an indispensable part of the company's sustainable development journey.
